title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at L&T Infotech International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at L&T Infotech International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
